wikitext.*: {{Infobox Team|neworg= Beşiktaş e-Sports Club |name= Aces High Esports Club |orgcountry= Turkey |country= |region= TR |image= AH logo.png |coaches= |manager= |captain= |website= |youtube= |facebook= https://www.facebook.com/aceshighesports |twitter= |irc= |sponsor= |created= 2014-09-29 |disbanded= |trades= }}{{TOCRWI|2}} '''Aces High Esports Club''' was a Turkish team. == History == The team competed at [[IEM Season IX - Cologne]] after winning the [[IEM_Season_IX_-_Cologne/Qualifiers#Final_Qualifier|Turkish Qualifier]] for the tournament. Aces High were knocked out in the quarterfinals, losing to [[Team Dignitas]], despite taking a game off the North American team. == Timeline == {{TeamNews}} == Player Roster == ===Former=== {|class="sortable wikitable" ! !ID !Name !Role !Next Team {{listplayer|Thaldrin|tr|Berke Demir|Top|newteam=Beşiktaş e-Sports Club}} {{listplayer|Theokoles|tr|Muhammed Işık|Jungle|newteam=Beşiktaş e-Sports Club}} {{listplayer|Energy|no|Isak Pettersen Fjell|Mid|newteam=Beşiktaş e-Sports Club}} {{listplayer|Nardeus|cz|Tomáš Maršálek|AD|newteam=Beşiktaş e-Sports Club}} {{listplayer|Dumbledoge|tr|Mustafa Kemal Gökseloğlu|Support|newteam=Beşiktaş e-Sports Club}} {{listplayer|Sidiouss|tr|Emre Ürük|Sub|newteam=manager}} {{listplayer|HolyPhoenix|tr|Anıl Işık|AD|newteam=DP}} {{listplayer|ReostA|tr|Yasin Es|Mid|newteam=none}} {{listplayer|Lethilion|tr|İbrahim Onur Aksu|Support|newteam=coach}} {{Listplayer/EndTemp}} ===Temporary Subs=== {|class="sortable wikitable" ! !ID !Name !Role !Replacing !Tournament |- {{listplayer|avenuee|de|Mustafa Atalay|Mid}} |{{none}} |rowspan=2|[[IEM Season IX - Cologne]] |- {{listplayer|NoXiAK|de|Lewis Felix|Support}} |{{none}} {{Listplayer/EndTemp}} ==Organization== ===Former=== {|class="sortable wikitable" ! !ID !Name !Position !Next Team {{listplayer|Lethilion|tr|İbrahim Onur Aksu|'''Coach'''|newteam=Beşiktaş e-Sports Club}} {{listplayersp|Sidiouss|tr|Emre Ürük|'''Manager'''|newteam=Beşiktaş e-Sports Club}} {{listplayersp|BunDem|tr|Alperen Güngör|'''Manager'''|newteam=Beşiktaş e-Sports Club}} {{Listplayer/EndTemp}} == Tournaments == {{TeamResults|show=overviewpage}} {{TeamShowmatchResults|show=overviewpage}} == Highlight Videos == ==Interviews== == Images == File:AF logo.png|Local Logo (Aces Full Esports Club) ==See Also== ==External Links== ==References==
